title: Software Developer (Full-stack) in Card Payments & Wallets team | SEB, Riga

summary.lv: SEB Rīgā meklē Full-stack izstrādātāju kartes maksājumu un maku komandai, kas veidos un uzturēs klientu maksājumu risinājumus visā Baltijā.
summary.en: SEB Riga is hiring a Full-stack Software Developer for the Card Payments & Wallets team to build and maintain customer payment solutions across the Baltics.
